languages.text: "Нет. Я командую блюстителями в рамках обороны замка и ношу звание капитана". {n}Мужчина демонстрирует рукав с вышитыми на нем знаками различия.{/n} "Для того, чтобы занять более высокий пост, мне недостает дворянского положения. Временные трудности".

"No. I command the enforcers as part of the palace defences and hold the rank of captain." {n}The man shows you the insignia embroidered on his sleeve.{/n} "I lack the noble status required for a higher appointment. A minor setback."
languages.original_text: "Нет. Я командую блюстителями в рамках обороны замка и ношу звание капитана". {n}Мужчина демонстрирует рукав с вышитыми на нем знаками различия.{/n} "Для того, чтобы занять более высокий пост, мне недостает дворянского положения. Временные трудности".

traits.locale_text: "No. I command the wardens as part of the palace defences and hold the rank of captain." {n}The man shows you the insignia embroidered on his sleeve.{/n} "I lack the noble status required for a higher appointment. A minor setback."

"No. I command the wardens as part of the palace defences and hold the rank of captain." {n}The man shows you the insignia embroidered on his sleeve.{/n} "I lack the noble status required for a higher appointment. A minor setback."

"No. I command the wardens as part of the palace defences and hold the rank of captain." {n}The man shows you the insignia embroidered on his sleeve.{/n} "I lack the noble status required for a higher appointment. A minor setback."

languages.text: «No. Estoy al mando de los guardias como parte de las defensas de palacio y ostento el rango de capitán». {n}El hombre te muestra la insignia bordada en su manga.{/n} «Carezco del estatus de noble que es necesario para un puesto superior. Una traba menor».
languages.original_text: "No. I command the enforcers as part of the palace defences and hold the rank of captain." {n}The man shows you the insignia embroidered on his sleeve.{/n} "I lack the noble status required for a higher appointment. A minor setback."

traits.locale_text: «No. Estoy al mando de los guardias como parte de las defensas de palacio y ostento el rango de capitán». {n}El hombre te muestra la insignia bordada en su manga.{/n} «Carezco del estatus de noble que es necesario para un puesto superior. Una traba menor».

languages.text: “不是。作为宫殿城防的一环，我指挥执法者，领上尉军衔。”{n}男人向你展示了绣在他袖子上的徽章。{/n}“我缺乏晋升所需的贵族头衔。不过是人生中一次小小的挫折罢了。”
languages.original_text: "No. I command the enforcers as part of the palace defences and hold the rank of captain." {n}The man shows you the insignia embroidered on his sleeve.{/n} "I lack the noble status required for a higher appointment. A minor setback."

traits.locale_text: “不是。作为宫殿城防的一环，我指挥执法者，领上尉军衔。”{n}男人向你展示了绣在他袖子上的徽章。{/n}“我缺乏晋升所需的贵族头衔。不过是人生中一次小小的挫折罢了。”

languages.text: « Non, je commande aux prévôts chargés de défendre le palais en qualité de capitaine. » {n}L'homme désigne l'insigne brodé sur sa manche.{/n} « Il me manque la noble ascendance nécessaire pour prétendre à un grade supérieur. Un inconvénient mineur dont je m'accommode parfaitement. »
languages.original_text: "No. I command the enforcers as part of the palace defences and hold the rank of captain." {n}The man shows you the insignia embroidered on his sleeve.{/n} "I lack the noble status required for a higher appointment. A minor setback."

traits.locale_text: « Non, je commande aux prévôts chargés de défendre le palais en qualité de capitaine. » {n}L'homme désigne l'insigne brodé sur sa manche.{/n} « Il me manque la noble ascendance nécessaire pour prétendre à un grade supérieur. Un inconvénient mineur dont je m'accommode parfaitement. »

languages.text: "Hayır. Saray savunmasının bir parçası olarak infazcılara komuta ediyorum, yüzbaşı rütbesindeyim." {n}Adam, koluna işlenmiş nişanı gösteriyor.{/n} "Daha yüksek bir mevki için gereken asil statüden yoksunum. Küçük bir aksilik."
languages.original_text: "No. I command the enforcers as part of the palace defences and hold the rank of captain." {n}The man shows you the insignia embroidered on his sleeve.{/n} "I lack the noble status required for a higher appointment. A minor setback."

traits.locale_text: "Hayır. Saray savunmasının bir parçası olarak infazcılara komuta ediyorum, yüzbaşı rütbesindeyim." {n}Adam, koluna işlenmiş nişanı gösteriyor.{/n} "Daha yüksek bir mevki için gereken asil statüden yoksunum. Küçük bir aksilik."

languages.text: "Nein. Ich befehlige die Enforcer im Rahmen der Palastverteidigung im Rang eines Captains." {n}Der Mann zeigt dir die auf seinen Ärmel gestickten Insignien.{/n} "Für einen höheren Rang fehlt mir der Adelsstand. Ein unbedeutender Rückschlag."
languages.original_text: "No. I command the enforcers as part of the palace defences and hold the rank of captain." {n}The man shows you the insignia embroidered on his sleeve.{/n} "I lack the noble status required for a higher appointment. A minor setback."

traits.locale_text: "Nein. Ich befehlige die Enforcer im Rahmen der Palastverteidigung im Rang eines Captains." {n}Der Mann zeigt dir die auf seinen Ärmel gestickten Insignien.{/n} "Für einen höheren Rang fehlt mir der Adelsstand. Ein unbedeutender Rückschlag."

languages.text: 「いいえ、私は宮廷の防衛の一環として、執行官を指揮しており、大尉の階級を持っています。」{n}この男は袖に刺繍された徽章を見せる。{/n}「私はより高い地位に就くために必要な貴族の身分を持っていません。小さな挫折です。」
languages.original_text: "No. I command the enforcers as part of the palace defences and hold the rank of captain." {n}The man shows you the insignia embroidered on his sleeve.{/n} "I lack the noble status required for a higher appointment. A minor setback."

traits.locale_text: 「いいえ、私は宮廷の防衛の一環として、執行官を指揮しており、大尉の階級を持っています。」{n}この男は袖に刺繍された徽章を見せる。{/n}「私はより高い地位に就くために必要な貴族の身分を持っていません。小さな挫折です。」
